prompt: Add undo/redo support to the state manager

turns.content:
<task>
Add undo/redo support to the state manager. Keep a history stack and allow undoing the last state change.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/store/state-manager.ts — generic StateManager<T> with getState() and setState(). Need to add history/future stacks for undo/redo.

next_steps.description: Add history/future stacks and undo()/redo() methods to StateManager

arguments.summary: Added undo/redo to StateManager in src/store/state-manager.ts. Uses history[] and future[] stacks. setState pushes to history and clears future. undo/redo swap between stacks. All 6 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Added undo/redo support to StateManager in src/store/state-manager.ts. History and future stacks track state changes. setState clears redo stack. undo()/redo() return boolean success. All 6 tests pass.
